stem: A scatterplot in the xy-plane has 10 data points trending up from left to right. A line of best fit passes through the approximate coordinates (0, 2), (4, 10), and (8, 18). Which of the following equations best represents the line of best fit shown?
rationale:
Choice C is correct. Slope = (10 − 2)/(4 − 0) = 2; y-intercept = 2. The line is y = 2 + 2x.

The other choices have wrong signs of the slope or y-intercept.
